prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Operators flagged a short window of unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should first surface the available sensor channels for T-014, then for the winding_temp_top_c channel report the anomaly findings and recent trend direction, and conclude whether the disturbance is an isolated burst or a sustained drift in the underlying signal.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_sensors — List sensor channels installed on T-014
  Step 2: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Run anomaly check on winding temperature channel (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [tsfm] trend_analysis — Run trend analysis on winding temperature channel (depends on steps [2])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "List sensor channels installed on T-014",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-014"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Run anomaly check on winding temperature channel",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "detect_anomalies",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-014",
      "sensor_id": "winding_temp_top_c",
      "window_size": 720,
      "z_threshold": null
    },
    "response": "Error executing tool detect_anomalies: 1 validation error for detect_anomaliesArguments\nz_threshold\n  Input should be a valid number [type=float_type, input_value=None, input_type=NoneType]\n    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/float_type",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Run trend analysis on winding temperature channel",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "trend_analysis",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-014",
      "sensor_id": "winding_temp_top_c",
      "start_time": null,
      "end_time": null
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-014\",\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720,\n  \"start_time\": \"2024-01-01 00:00:00\",\n  \"end_time\": \"2024-01-30 23:00:00\",\n  \"mean_value\": 79.6196,\n  \"min_value\": 40.231,\n  \"max_value\": 136.394,\n  \"slope_per_day\": 0.046413,\n  \"direction\": \"stable\",\n  \"r_squared\": 0.0007\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the results, the sensor channels installed on T-014 include:

- load_current_a
- oil_temp_c
- power_factor
- voltage_hv_kv
- voltage_lv_kv
- winding_temp_top_c

The anomaly check on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) failed due to a validation error, so no conclusions can be drawn from it.

The trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) indicates a stable trend with a slight increase over time (slope_per_day: 0.046413), but the R-squared value (0.0007) suggests that the relationship between time and temperature is not strongly correlated.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "The agent should handle the validation error in the anomaly check step and provide a valid z_threshold value."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should handle the validation error in the anomaly check step and provide a valid z_threshold value.
